name: DShot ESC and BLHeli Telemetry Configuration
description: You are a Drone Assembly Technician. You have just finished wiring a heavy-lift multicopter with digital BLHeli32 ESCs and 28-pole pancake motors. Before the maiden flight, you must configure the flight controller to use DShot600, map the ESC telemetry wire to the correct serial port, and configure the harmonic notch filter to use live RPM data for vibration cancellation. Identify and update the 7 specific ArduPilot parameters from their factory defaults based on the hardware build sheet at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/esc_build_sheet.txt.
